messages.text: Task: Hi Chee Keat, our data structure assignment is going to be due on 8th May. We should schedule a meeting on 18th April at 8 PM to discuss the work distribution in Google Docs.

text_entities.text: Task: Hi Chee Keat, our data structure assignment is going to be due on 8th May. We should schedule a meeting on 18th April at 8 PM to discuss the work distribution in Google Docs.

messages.text: Task: Yes, we also need to start working on the presentation slides on 20th April and complete them by 1st May.

messages.text: Event: By the way, tonight 8pm has a concert at KK12. Let's go have fun.
